name: Green Lentil Rissoles
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the lentils and hot water in a pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
2. Melt margarine in a skillet. Add onion and cook for 2 minutes. Stir in carrot and pepper, cooking for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Mix spices (cayenne, coriander, cumin, curry powder), tomato paste, salt, and pepper into the vegetable mixture. Combine well.
4. Stir in parsley and mix with cooled lentils until fully incorporated.
5. Divide the mixture into 12 equal portions. Shape each portion into a round disc.
6. Coat the rissoles in an even layer of combined breadcrumbs and oats (if needed, blend oats to resemble fine breadcrumbs).
7. Shallow fry in hot oil until golden brown on both sides. Remove from oil and drain well.
8. For yogurt sauce: Combine yogurt, parsley, chives, garlic, cumin, and lemon juice with salt and pepper to taste. Chill until ready to serve.
